briefdescription.para: Construct a ConfigDialog associated with the given main window.
Enable or disable clipboard selection mode.
Enable or disable autoclear of the clipboard.
Enable or disable autoclear of the panel.

simplesect.para: Hash of profile name to key-value settings map.

parameterdescription.para: Parent dialog to return to after generation.

briefdescription.para: Show or hide the system tray icon.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable the tray icon.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable grep content search.
Enable or disable QR code display.
Set the path to the pwgen executable.
Enable or disable pwgen-based password generation.
Apply a password configuration to the dialog controls.
Read the current password configuration from the dialog controls.
Enable or disable password file templating.
Save settings and clean up on close.

memberdef.argsstring: (QHash< QString, QHash< QString, QString > >, const QString &)
memberdef.name: setProfiles

param.type: const QHash< QString, QHash< QString, QString > > &

briefdescription.para: The ConfigDialog handles the configuration interface.

detaileddescription.para: Presents controls for profiles, generation tools (pwgen/pass), GPG/git/OTP/qrencode integration, template handling, tray icon and autoclear options, and exposes methods to read and update those settings.
